methodology.overallScoreFormula: sum(domain.score * domain.weight) across 6 domains; weights: economic=0.17, infrastructure=0.15, energy=0.11, social-governance=0.19, health-food=0.13, recovery=0.25 (sum=1.00).
methodology.coverageLabel: Mean dimension coverage (avg of the 19 per-dimension coverage values). Labelled 'Dimension coverage' in publications to avoid the ambiguity of 'Data coverage'.
